2604.05839.title: Vision-Guided Iterative Refinement for Frontend Code Generation
2604.05839.paper_summary: Code generation with large language models often relies on multi-stage human-in-the-loop refinement, which is effective but very costly - particularly in domains such as frontend web development where the solution quality depends on rendered visual output. We present a fully automated critic-in-the-loop framework in which a vision-language model serves as a visual critic that provides structured feedback on rendered webpages to guide iterative refinement of generated code. Across real-world user requests from the WebDev Arena dataset, this approach yields consistent improvements in solution quality, achieving up to 17.8% increase in performance over three refinement cycles. Next, we investigate parameter-efficient fine-tuning using LoRA to understand whether the improvements provided by the critic can be internalized by the code-generating LLM. Fine-tuning achieves 25% of the gains from the best critic-in-the-loop solution without a significant increase in token counts. Our findings indicate that automated, VLM-based critique of frontend code generation leads to significantly higher quality solutions than can be achieved through a single LLM inference pass, and highlight the importance of iterative refinement for the complex visual outputs associated with web development.
2604.05839.paper_summary_zh: 代碼生成與大型語言模型通常依賴於多階段的人類介入精煉，這種方法雖然有效但成本極高，尤其是在前端網頁開發等領域，解決方案的質量依賴於渲染的視覺輸出。<lb/>我們提出了一個完全自動化的批評者介入框架，其中一個視覺-語言模型作為視覺批評者，對渲染的網頁提供結構化的反饋，以指導生成代碼的迭代精煉。<lb/>在來自 WebDev Arena 數據集的真實用戶請求中，這種方法在解決方案質量上持續取得改善，經過三個精煉周期，性能提高了高達 17.8%。<lb/>接下來，我們研究使用 LoRA 進行參數高效的微調，以了解批評者所提供的改善是否能被代碼生成 LLM 內化。<lb/>微調實現了最佳批評者介入解決方案 25% 的增益，而未顯著增加標記數量。<lb/>我們的研究結果表明，自動化的基於 VLM 的前端代碼生成批評導致的解決方案質量顯著高於僅通過單次 LLM 推理所能達到的質量，並強調了對於與網頁開發相關的複雜視覺輸出進行迭代精煉的重要性。
2604.05839.author: Hannah Sansford et.al.
2604.05839.authors: Hannah Sansford, Derek H. C. Law, Wei Liu, Abhishek Tripathi, Niresh Agarwal, Gerrit J. J. van den Burg
